goal: VeilaTarot-style sequential card flip-reveal on the multi-card reading result
done: buildCardArt (thumb variant) now adds a .card-art-back card-back overlay + .will-flip; CSS §B8 crossfades the back out (mtCardFlipReveal 0.55s) staggered by --reveal-i so cards flip back->face one-by-one. applyFlipStagger() sets the per-card index after the Celtic + Question spreads render. Pure-CSS animation => face ALWAYS ends visible even if the JS stagger never runs (reduced-motion = instant). Poster/share read card DATA not the DOM, so unaffected; reversed = upright-rotated-180 preserved. Verified: question 3-card result ends showing faces; DOM has 3 backs + --reveal-i 0/1/2; backs animate to opacity 0.
notes: Single-card daily uses its existing reveal (hero variant, no flip). /js/reading.js sits behind the same multi-hour edge cache -> may need a short wait / hard-refresh to reach users (durable cure = versioned asset URLs).
